name: studio.list_posts
description: Enumerate blog posts on an Actium Studio site. Returns post ids, slugs, status, author, and timestamps.
whenToUse: Agent needs the post_id of a specific blog post before editing or publishing.
Editorial audit: pull drafts older than X days; feed to a cleanup or nudge flow.
Populate a sitemap, RSS feed input, or a 'recent posts' widget from blog data.
whenNotToUse: Caller already has the post_id — go directly to studio.get_post.
Caller wants pages, not blog posts — use studio.list_pages; pages and posts are separate.
Caller wants only a single post by slug — prefer studio.get_post with a lookup if the id is unknown, rather than listing and filtering.
